title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud environment where AI agents can build, deploy, host, and run real software. It provides a full Ubuntu workspace with database, storage, terminal, SSH, GitHub, AWS integration, and HTTPS deployment capabilities. This bridges the gap between code generation and live production deployment for AI agents.
